problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
hypothesis: The key to Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it? is Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response — specifically Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response — which would help 3,000,000,000 people affected.
